feed.title: BORIS is an easy-to-use event logging software for video/audio coding and live observations.

entry.title: 2026-02-06: Release of version 9.8.5
entry.content: The version 9.8.5 is available. Fixed some bugs and improved usability with MacOS
entry.summary: The version 9.8.5 is available. Fixed some bugs and improved usability with MacOS

entry.title: 2026-03-09: Release of version 9.8.6
entry.content: The version 9.8.6 is available. Improved spectrogram and waveform visualization. Now each player can display spectrogram and waveform
entry.summary: The version 9.8.6 is available. Improved spectrogram and waveform visualization. Now each player can display spectrogram and waveform

entry.title: 2026-03-30: Release of version 9.9
entry.content: The version 9.9 is available. Added possibility to use combinations of keys (like CTRL+K, Alt+A ...) for coding (behavior and subject).
entry.summary: The version 9.9 is available. Added possibility to use combinations of keys (like CTRL+K, Alt+A ...) for coding (behavior and subject).

entry.title: 2026-04-13: Release of version 9.10
entry.content: The version 9.10 is available. Added a plugin for behavior latency.
entry.summary: The version 9.10 is available. Added a plugin for behavior latency.

entry.title: 2026-04-28: Release of version 9.10.1
entry.content: The version 9.10.1 is available. Fixed bug in previous/next media function
entry.summary: The version 9.10.1 is available. Fixed bug in previous/next media function
